en.extract:
The goliath coucal (Centropus goliath) is a species of cuckoo in the family Cuculidae. It is found in the northern Maluku Islands.

The '''goliath coucal''' ('''''Centropus goliath''''') is a species of [[cuckoo]] in the family [[Cuculidae]]. It is found in the northern [[Maluku Islands]].
